articles.title: Cohere为何兼并Aleph Alpha
articles.title_original: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha

articles.summary_original: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group.
